name: Newland Chase
description: A premier global immigration firm specializing in complex residency pathways and high-level permits. They provide full-spectrum support for the Long-Term Resident (LTR) visa and the Destination Thailand Visa (DTV), catering specifically to high-net-worth retirees and professionals.

name: Thai Visa Centre
description: A highly-rated agency known for transparent pricing and simplifying the bureaucracy of Thai immigration. They specialize in standard Non-O (Retirement) and Marriage visas, offering in-person assistance at immigration offices and managing 90-day reporting.

name: Kasikorn Bank (KBank)
description: The leading choice for tech-savvy expats due to its superior English-language mobile interface (K-PLUS app). They offer specialized services like "The Wisdom" priority banking and are generally flexible with documentation for foreigners holding long-term visas.

name: Bangkok Bank (BBL)
description: The most established bank for international transfers and the preferred choice for those receiving pensions from abroad. It features a large international branch network and specialized Foreign Currency Deposit (FCD) accounts to help manage exchange rate risks.

name: Expat Tax Thailand
address: No. 1 Park Silom Tower, 29th Floor, Convent Road, Silom, Bang Rak, Bangkok 10500
description: Specialist firm focusing on Thai tax residency and recent tax law changes. They assist expats in obtaining a Tax Identification Number (TIN), providing education on legal reporting of foreign-sourced income, and offering support for succession planning and Thai wills.

name: Mazars Thailand
description: A global accounting and advisory firm with a dedicated international desk for complex financial planning. Ideal for retirees with global assets who need to navigate Double Tax Agreements (DTA) to ensure they are not over-taxed.

name: Worldwide Relocations (Thailand)
description: A boutique relocation agency providing a "soft landing" for expats. They offer door-to-door shipping, pet relocation services, and personalized home-finding assistance to ensure a smooth transition to life in Thailand.

name: Santa Fe Relocation
description: A global logistics giant with decades of experience navigating Thai customs and shipping regulations. They are known for professional packing services and dedicated coordinators who manage the entire logistical move from the origin country.

name: Bumrungrad International Hospital
description: One of the most famous private hospitals in the world, serving as a primary medical hub for expats. It features a dedicated Expatriate Liaison Center and world-class geriatric care units tailored for retirees.

name: Samitivej Sukhumvit Hospital
description: A premium facility in the heart of Bangkok’s expat district, known for its personalized healthcare approach. It offers specialized "Life Centers" for anti-aging and wellness, as well as comprehensive preventative health packages.

name: Pacific Prime Thailand
address: 548 One City Centre Building 25th floor, Ploenchit Road, Lumpini, Pathumwan, Bangkok, 10330 Thailand
description: A leading international insurance broker that compares all major local and global health plans. They help retirees find plans that meet strict coverage requirements often needed for Thai long-term visas.

name: Luma Health
description: A Thailand-based insurer designed specifically to provide seamless coverage for Southeast Asian expats. Provides direct billing at top hospitals like Bumrungrad and Samitivej, minimizing out-of-pocket expenses for inpatient care.

name: Varnavas Law Firm
description: A premier, Athens-based law firm with over 45 years of experience in property and real estate investment. They are specialists in the Greek Golden Visa program and legal tax-incentive planning.

name: Kyriakides Georgopoulos (KG) Law Firm
description: A leading independent law firm providing full-scale representation for international relocation. They specialize in securing the Financially Independent Person (FIP) and Digital Nomad visas.

name: Alpha Bank
description: One of Greece's major financial institutions, widely used by international clients for wealth management. They offer non-resident checking options and a robust English digital platform.

name: Eurobank Greece
description: A premier retail banking pillar in Greece, known for its efficient digital onboarding for international customers. Their mobile banking provides comprehensive English-language assistance.

name: KPMG Greece
description: Top-tier international advisory brand providing comprehensive financial planning. They help foreigners navigate Greece's non-domiciled (Non-Dom) tax programs and optimize income tax liability.

name: Andersen in Greece
description: Elite tax and legal advisory firm specialized in cross-border wealth management. They focus on international inheritance frameworks and double-taxation treaty alignment.

name: Hellenic Relocation
description: Dedicated end-to-end destination management provider. They handle home hunting, school selection, and utility synchronization for families moving to Greece.

name: Orphee Beinoglou (OB) Logistics
description: The premier transport and corporate relocation logistics corporation in Greece. They handle global household shipping, customs clearance, and secure warehouse storage.

name: Hygeia Hospital
description: A world-class private medical facility in Athens, internationally acclaimed for clinical excellence. They operate a fully customized International Patient Department with medical translation services.

name: European Interbalkan Medical Center
description: A comprehensive private hospital group in Northern Greece (Thessaloniki). Renowned for specialized cardiac programs and preventative geriatric monitoring networks.

name: Generali Hellas
description: A major global insurance giant with a dominant market footprint in Greece. They offer health insurance plans that align with legal immigration requirements for non-EU citizens.

name: National Insurance Company (Ethniki Asfalistiki)
description: The oldest and most expansive historical insurance provider in Greece. They offer tiered medical insurance packages that mesh cleanly with local private clinic systems.

name: Lamares, Capela e Associados (LACA)
description: A leading law firm specializing in nationality, immigration, and digital nomad residency. Highly regarded for their client-first approach to D7 and D8 visa processes.

name: GFDL Advogados
description: A full-service independent law firm with a dedicated team for international investors. They handle complex business visas and provide rigorous legal solutions for high-net-worth relocations.

name: Millennium BCP
description: One of the largest private banks in Portugal with a dedicated international desk. Known for a user-friendly English app and personal account managers for expat clients.

name: ActivoBank
description: A modern, digital-first bank highly popular for its low fees and streamlined English interface. Often the easiest bank for expats to open an account with quickly.

name: FRESH Portugal
description: The largest expat legal and tax advisory in Portugal. They specialize in optimizing tax for US/UK expats and navigating the NHR 2.0 tax regimes.

name: Chase Buchanan
description: A regulated global wealth management firm with a strong presence in Portugal. Provides independent advice on pensions and investment portfolios for global expats.

name: Moviinn
description: A specialized relocation concierge focusing on the human side of moving. They provide full-service support from region selection to settling-in services like utilities.

name: Global International Relocation
description: A premier logistics and moving company based in Portugal. Experts in moving household goods and pets, offering door-to-door service with full customs management.

name: Hospital da Luz Network
description: Portugal's most technologically advanced private healthcare network. They offer an English-speaking International Patient wing and a robust app for booking appointments.

name: CUF Health Network
description: The oldest and most established private healthcare provider in Portugal. Known for excellence in oncology and complex surgeries across all major regions.

name: MGEN
description: A non-profit mutual insurer known for having no age limit and no medical questionnaires. Highly recommended for older retirees (70+).

name: Allianz
description: A global leader in insurance with a massive direct-billing network in Portugal. Provides comprehensive plans that meet all D7 visa requirements.

name: Balcells Group
description: A prominent international law firm specializing in Non-Lucrative Visas, Digital Nomad Visas, and Golden Visas for retirees in Spain.

name: Bureaucracy Spain
description: Dedicated legal and administrative agency focused on smoothing out complex Spanish immigration and residency procedures, including NIE and document localization.

name: Banco Santander
description: The largest banking institution in Spain, offering dedicated non-resident accounts and comprehensive English-language support.

name: BBVA
description: A leading Spanish banking group known for its market-leading digital application and paperless account creation.

name: Abante Asesores
description: Independent financial advisory firm specializing in retirement income structuring and navigating progressive autonomous tax rates in Spain.

name: Blevins Franks
description: Cross-border tax and wealth preservation experts optimizing pension transfers and structuring investments for Spanish tax compliance.

name: Moving2Spain
description: Boutique relocation agency managing full-scale transitions, including home hunting, school selection, and utility setup for international retirees.

name: SIT Spain
description: Premier international relocation firm specializing in cross-border household transport, customs clearance, and pet relocation protocols.

name: Quirónsalud
description: The largest private healthcare network in Spain, featuring international patient departments and advanced medical technology.

name: HM Hospitales
description: Leading private hospital network offering personalized medical coordinators and care entirely in English or other native languages.

name: Sanitas
description: Leading medical insurance provider in Spain offering plans optimized specifically for immigration approval with zero copays and no waiting periods.

name: Adeslas
description: The largest health insurance company in Spain with an expansive network of private doctors and direct billing to top hospitals.
